[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000 2
1 1011001 4
2 0011100 3
3 1001000 2
4 1111100 5
5 1010010 3
6 1110100 4
7 1101101 5

12 21 1001000 2 match 0 3
23 32 1111100 5 match 4

56 65 1101101 5 match 7
67 76 0111010 4
70 07 1011001 4 match 1

72 27 0001101 3
